trackingsummarydata.subject: Awards, a contest and busting exam stress
trackingsummarydata.title: FSSG - 02/10/25

urls.page_title: New Klarman Fellows to join the College of Arts and Sciences
urls.page_summary: Fellows will pursue research in the sciences, social sciences and humanities.
urls.page_title: 2025 Cornell 3MT Competition Announced - Graduate School : Graduate School
urls.page_summary: January 27, 2025 By Katya Hrichak You’ve done your research. You’ve collected your data. You can talk about your findings in great detail with others in your field. But can…
Awards and honors received by faculty, postdocs and graduate students in the College of Arts & Sciences.
urls.page_title: Frederick Ahl, innovative classics scholar, dies at 83
urls.page_summary: A scholar of Greek and Roman epic and drama and the intellectual history of Greece and Rome, Ahl was a member of the Cornell faculty for more than 52 years.
urls.page_title: Durable plastic gets a sustainability makeover
urls.page_summary: A Cornell chemist has created an alternative to the unrecyclable, plastic-based material used for durable items such as car tires, replacement hip joints and bowling balls.
urls.page_title: Annual Invitational Lecture: Samantha N. Sheppard - Cornell
urls.page_summary: The Annual Invitational Lecture of the Society for the Humanities is designed to give a Cornell audience a chance to hear one of our distinguished Cornell humanities faculty members who may frequently speak at other universities, but whom we seldo...
urls.page_title: NBC News’ Anne Thompson named Distinguished Visiting Journalist
urls.page_summary: Thompson is NBC News’ chief environmental affairs correspondent.
urls.page_title: Benjamin Widom, influential physical chemist, dies at 97
urls.page_summary: Benjamin Widom, Ph.D. ’53, Goldwin Smith Professor Emeritus in the Department of Chemistry and Chemical Biology in the College of Arts and Sciences, died Jan. 23 in Ithaca. He was 97.
urls.page_title: Rachel Beatty Riedl | Department of Government
